name: Add Plasmic Page

parameters.command: =set -eu; S=$(grep -m1 '^ADD_PAGE_SECRET=' /opt/plasmic-page-api/.env | cut -d= -f2-); echo '{{ JSON.stringify({ projectId: $json.body.projectId, pageName: $json.body.pageName, path: $json.body.path, text: $json.body.text }).base64Encode() }}' | base64 -d | curl -sS -m 55 -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8765/add-page -H "Authorization: Bearer $S" -H 'content-type: application/json' --data-binary @- -w '\n%{http_code}'

=set -eu; S=$(grep -m1 '^ADD_PAGE_SECRET=' /opt/plasmic-page-api/.env | cut -d= -f2-); echo '{{ JSON.stringify({ projectId: $json.body.projectId, pageName: $json.body.pageName, path: $json.body.path, text: $json.body.text }).base64Encode() }}' | base64 -d | curl -sS -m 55 -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8765/add-page -H "Authorization: Bearer $S" -H 'content-type: application/json' --data-binary @- -w '\n%{http_code}'

description: POST /webhook/add-plasmic-page with {projectId, pageName, path, text} — adds a text page to a Plasmic project via Studio revision API. Reads Studio credentials from n8n Variables.
